title: No Tricks, Just Treats: Unwrap the Newest Trailhead Learning
author: Nicole Isaacson

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: Dreamforce 2025 is officially here, and Team Trailhead has been hard at work creating new learning adventures to help you skill up for the future. Whether you’re looking for a fun seasonal challenge or a strategic head start on the latest in agentic AI, we’ve got something for you. Let’s dive in!

sections.heading: Celebrate spooky season with Trick or Trailhead
sections.text: We’ve released a spook-tacular learning adventure just in time for Dreamforce! Something strange is happening at Sillicorn Valley Manor, and we need your help to lift the spirits of the guests. In our newTrick or Trailhead badge, you’ll take on the role of a ghost wrangler, called in to solve a paranormal problem. A mischievous ghost is running amok, hiding pumpkins, filling rooms with a-maize-ing amounts of candy corn, and creating phantom experiences in the graveyard. It’s a real boo-siness, and only your skills can help debug this haunted house. This hands-on challenge is full of tricks and treats, guiding you step-by-step through a fun, festive scenario. You’ll have a gourd time practicing your skills while helping the manor’s guests, like Ruth the elephant, get back to their frightfully fun festivities. So grab your Proton Pack, mouse and keyboard, and get ready to earn a badge that’s so fun, it’s scary! Happy haunting, Trailblazers!

sections.heading: Get a strategic head start with agentic enterprise planning
sections.text: A successful agentic AI strategy requires more than just technology. To guide your organization, we’re thrilled to launchExplore the Future of Digital Labor, a new 35-minute trail designed for IT leaders and architects. This learning path demystifies the world of AI agents by breaking down their core anatomy, exploring the hidden costs of agentic architecture, and providing a practical, 4-step maturity model. It’s your playbook for moving beyond the hype and building a real, actionable agent roadmap for your organization.

inline_links.text: Explore the Future of Digital Labor

sections.heading: Unlock the power of data with a new learning series
sections.text: Data is the keythat powers decision-making, fuels innovation, and creates a competitive edge. That’s why having data literacy, the ability to unify, analyze, and interpret information, and Data Cloud skills are more important than ever. That’s why we created a three part learning series to give you the skills to create personalized, relevant customer experiences that drive business value. Move from foundational understanding to applied Data Cloud expertise, earning badges along the way that mark your progress. Data Cloud: Unlock the Value of Your Data– Explain Data Cloud concepts and business impact.Data Cloud: From Setup to Activation– Implement Data Cloud solutions to drive measurable business outcomes.Data Cloud: Develop and Build Solutions (Coming Soon!) – Understand advanced concepts and build cross-cloud solutions. You never have to learn alone. Join theDatablazer Communityto network, ask questions, and share knowledge. Start your Data Cloud Journey today and learn the language of connected customer data.

inline_links.text: Data Cloud: Unlock the Value of Your Data
Data Cloud: From Setup to Activation

sections.heading: Level up with new innovations for Agentblazer Status
sections.text: The Future ofAgentblazer Statusis here! In a world where AI is constantly evolving, staying ahead means continuously learning. That’s why we’re excited to announce that we’ve brought brand new learning to theBecome an Agentblazer Championand theBecome an Agentblazer Innovatortrails. This is part of our ongoing commitment to provide you with the most relevant skills for the future. We’ll be regularly updating Agentblazer Status trails with the latest breakthroughs, trends, and practical applications in AI, empowering you to build with the best and most current knowledge available.

sections.heading: Coming in 2026: Agentblazer Status renewals
sections.text: To help you demonstrate your ongoing commitment to AI expertise, we’re also excited to share what’s next. And starting in 2026,you’ll be able to renew all three levels of Agentblazer Status annually. This ensures you’re continuing to grow your AI knowledge and keeping pace with innovation. When you complete an Agentblazer Status trail, you’ll earn that status for the calendar year. And don’t worry, your achievements from previous years won’t go away. They’ll remain on your Trailblazer Profile to showcase your complete Agentblazer journey. See theFAQfor more details.

sections.heading: Tomorrow’s opportunities belong to today’s learners
sections.text: The future of business is being built today, and with these new learning opportunities, you have everything you need to be at the forefront. Whether you’re wrangling ghosts or architecting an AI strategy, your next chapter starts now. So what are you waiting for? Dig in, level up, and learn something new today!

raw_html:
Dreamforce 2025 is officially here, and Team Trailhead has been hard at work creating new learning adventures to help you skill up for the future. Whether you’re looking for a fun seasonal challenge or a strategic head start on the latest in agentic AI, we’ve got something for you. Let’s dive in!

Celebrate spooky season with Trick or Trailhead

We’ve released a spook-tacular learning adventure just in time for Dreamforce! Something strange is happening at Sillicorn Valley Manor, and we need your help to lift the spirits of the guests. In our new Trick or Trailhead badge, you’ll take on the role of a ghost wrangler, called in to solve a paranormal problem. A mischievous ghost is running amok, hiding pumpkins, filling rooms with a-maize-ing amounts of candy corn, and creating phantom experiences in the graveyard. It’s a real boo-siness, and only your skills can help debug this haunted house.

This hands-on challenge is full of tricks and treats, guiding you step-by-step through a fun, festive scenario. You’ll have a gourd time practicing your skills while helping the manor’s guests, like Ruth the elephant, get back to their frightfully fun festivities. So grab your Proton Pack, mouse and keyboard, and get ready to earn a badge that’s so fun, it’s scary! Happy haunting, Trailblazers!

Get a strategic head start with agentic enterprise planning

A successful agentic AI strategy requires more than just technology. To guide your organization, we’re thrilled to launch Explore the Future of Digital Labor, a new 35-minute trail designed for IT leaders and architects. This learning path demystifies the world of AI agents by breaking down their core anatomy, exploring the hidden costs of agentic architecture, and providing a practical, 4-step maturity model. It’s your playbook for moving beyond the hype and building a real, actionable agent roadmap for your organization. 

Unlock the power of data with a new learning series

Data is the key that powers decision-making, fuels innovation, and creates a competitive edge. That’s why having data literacy, the ability to unify, analyze, and interpret information, and Data Cloud skills are more important than ever. 

That’s why we created a three part learning series to give you the skills to create personalized, relevant customer experiences that drive business value. Move from foundational understanding to applied Data Cloud expertise, earning badges along the way that mark your progress. 

  • Data Cloud: Unlock the Value of Your Data – Explain Data Cloud concepts and business impact. 
  • Data Cloud: From Setup to Activation – Implement Data Cloud solutions to drive measurable business outcomes.
  • Data Cloud: Develop and Build Solutions (Coming Soon!) – Understand advanced concepts and build cross-cloud solutions. 

You never have to learn alone. Join the Datablazer Community to network, ask questions, and share knowledge. Start your Data Cloud Journey today and learn the language of connected customer data. 

Level up with new innovations for Agentblazer Status

The Future of Agentblazer Status is here! In a world where AI is constantly evolving, staying ahead means continuously learning. That’s why we’re excited to announce that we’ve brought brand new learning to the Become an Agentblazer Champion and the Become an Agentblazer Innovator trails. This is part of our ongoing commitment to provide you with the most relevant skills for the future. We’ll be regularly updating Agentblazer Status trails with the latest breakthroughs, trends, and practical applications in AI, empowering you to build with the best and most current knowledge available. 

Coming in 2026: Agentblazer Status renewals

To help you demonstrate your ongoing commitment to AI expertise, we’re also excited to share what’s next. And starting in 2026, you’ll be able to renew all three levels of Agentblazer Status annually. This ensures you’re continuing to grow your AI knowledge and keeping pace with innovation. When you complete an Agentblazer Status trail, you’ll earn that status for the calendar year. And don’t worry, your achievements from previous years won’t go away. They’ll remain on your Trailblazer Profile to showcase your complete Agentblazer journey. See the FAQ for more details.

Tomorrow’s opportunities belong to today’s learners

The future of business is being built today, and with these new learning opportunities, you have everything you need to be at the forefront. Whether you’re wrangling ghosts or architecting an AI strategy, your next chapter starts now. So what are you waiting for? Dig in, level up, and learn something new today!
